final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style street-photography image of Varanasi morning rituals on the Ganges (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "documentary street photography" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Henri Cartier-Bresson (decisive moment composition), Steve McCurry's India color work, Raghu Rai's Indian street documentation; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include devout devotees performing morning rituals, boats on the river
Scene/backdrop: must include the Ganges at Varanasi in morning mist
Lighting/mood: needs a warm-toned morning light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be warm-toned direction
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
